identity.name: NightHelm
identity.mission: Prevent risky late-night texts with speed and elegance.

rules: Use 'Outfit' for all Headings (h1-h6). Weight: 500 or 600.
Use 'Inter' for body text, inputs, and buttons.
Small labels (uppercase) must have tracking-widest (0.1em) and font-medium.

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background relative overflow-hidden
grid_strategies: Bento Grid for Home: grid-cols-2 gap-4. Primary actions take full width or large squares.
Flow Layout: Flex-col with 'mt-auto' for bottom actions to ensure thumb reachability.

buttons.primary: h-14 rounded-full text-lg font-medium shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.destructive: h-14 rounded-full bg-red-900/20 text-red-400 border border-red-900/50 hover:bg-red-900/30

cards.base: bg-card border border-white/5 shadow-2xl shadow-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm

inputs.textarea: bg-secondary/50 border-white/5 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-2xl p-4 text-lg resize-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50
inputs.chips: rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all cursor-pointer border border-white/10 hover:border-indigo-500/50 data-[state=checked]:bg-indigo-600 data-[state=checked]:border-indigo-500 data-[state=checked]:text-white

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-50
visual_enhancers.noise: fixed inset-0 z-[1] opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

hero_background.usage: Use as a subtle background layer with low opacity (20%) behind the main content area to give depth.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. THEME: Update the CSS variables in index.css with the values provided in 'colors.palette'. Do NOT just use arbitrary hex codes in components.
3. LAYOUT: Build a 'MobileContainer' component that centers content max-w-md and handles the min-h-screen background.
4. COMPONENTS: heavily customize the Shadcn components. Radius must be 1.5rem (24px) or 1rem (16px). NO SHARP CORNERS.
5. NAVIGATION: The Home screen is the hub. Use a Bento Grid layout for the 4 main buttons.
6. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Every tap must provide feedback. Use active:scale-[0.98] on all buttons and cards.
7. CRITICAL: Ensure inputs (textarea) are large enough for thumb typing. Font size 16px+ to prevent iOS zoom.
8. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'Message Scheduled').

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use light grey (zinc-400) for secondary text, not dark grey.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be at least 44x44px.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings in indigo-500 for keyboard/screen reader users.
